fields.name: Description
fields.default: Beyond our seasonal and signature collections, Allison accepts a limited number of custom commissions each month. Whether it's a reimagined heirloom or something entirely new, every custom piece begins with conversation.

default.text: Choose your metals — recycled silver, copper, or bronze
Select stones from our ethically sourced collection
Rings, earrings, necklaces, or something entirely your own

default.title: Share Your Vision
default.description: Tell Allison what you're dreaming of — a sketch, a feeling, a memory to carry with you.

default.title: Design Together
default.description: Allison sketches options and selects materials. You'll approve the direction before any metal is shaped.

default.title: Handcraft & Ship
default.description: Your piece is made entirely by hand in the Hackensack workshop, then carefully packaged and sent to you.
